L.A. Immigration Protests Clashes Between Protesters and Cops ... Feds Want to Step In!!!

  • 1.8K shares
Published June 7, 2025 6:42 PM PDT | Updated June 7, 2025 7:23 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Protests in LA Launch Gallery
Getty

Hundreds of protesters in Los Angeles clashed with federal immigration agents over deportations — and the Trump administration says it now wants to send in the National Guard to quell the riots.

Photos from the first two days of demonstrations captured harrowing scenes ... with massive fires breaking out and border patrol agents chucking tear gas in Paramount, about 20 minutes south of downtown Los Angeles.

Getty

Check out the law enforcement personnel marching in a line down the streets ... weapons drawn as they work to disperse the crowds.

Donald Trump Attends UFC 316 ... Sans Elon Musk After Week Of Fighting

  • 1.4K shares
Published June 7, 2025 7:39 PM PDT
UFC

Donald Trump, after a week of sparring with Elon Musk, is going to let someone else throw the punches Saturday night ... the president just showed up to UFC 316, receiving a rousing ovation from the New Jersey crowd!

POTUS walked into The Prudential Center in Newark just before the main card kicked off ... walking out of the tunnel and to his Octagon-side seats with his longtime friend, UFC honcho Dana White.

How about THAT for an entrance?! #UFC316

The bossman takes his seat alongside Donald Trump 🇺🇸 pic.twitter.com/3EEVNVhSHw

— UFC Europe (@UFCEurope) June 8, 2025 @UFCEurope

And no ... Elon wasn't there, as he was when the guys attended UFC 309 in November, just days after DJT won the 2024 election in decisive fashion.

However, some of 47's cabinet are in the building -- including Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Eric Trump and Ivanka Trump are also at the fights ... seated nearby their father.

Getty

Of course, it's been a crazy week for Trump ... who saw his relationship with the world's richest man crumble into a million pieces, with the men trading barbs on social media.

Things have seemingly cooled down ... but the men haven't spoken.

Getty

As for the card, 316 features two title fights ... Kayla Harrison vs. Julianna Pena in the co-main, and "Suga" Sean O'Malley vs. Merab Dvalishvili, in addition to a few other compelling scraps.

While Trump is the biggest star, there are a bunch of celebs catching the action, including Mike Tyson.

  • Share on Facebook
  • Share on X
    Donald Trump Elon Musk Marco Rubio TMZ Sports

Diddy Files For Mistrial Again ... Claims Prosecutors Presented False Testimony!!!

  • Exclusive
  • 663 shares
Published June 7, 2025 2:11 PM PDT | Updated June 7, 2025 4:47 PM PDT
Shutterstock

Diddy's asking the judge in his case for a mistrial again ... accusing prosecutors of presenting testimony they knew -- or should've known -- was false.

The rapper and mogul's legal team filed the letter Saturday morning ... and, the reasons for their request are related to testimony about the alleged incident where Bryana Bongolan -- a friend of Cassie's and fashion designer -- says Diddy held her over the edge of a balcony, 17 stories in the air.

X / @BanaBongolan

Diddy's lawyers say prosecutors presented untrue testimony when Cassie testified about the incident because she said she actually saw Diddy holding Bryana over the balcony's edge.

Kourtney & Travis Rocky’s Big Day Out ... Holds on to Mom, Cheers on Dad!!!

  • Exclusive
  • 555 shares
Published June 7, 2025 4:30 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Rock out, baby! Launch Gallery
Mega

Kourtney Kardashian and Travis Barker are the proudest parents -- bringing their baby boy Rocky to a special event for the Blink-182 rocker Saturday afternoon.

That's right -- rarely seen Rocky tagged along with his famous parents as Travis was honored by his native Fontana, California which renamed a street -- and a full day -- named after him!

Mega

Check out the pics ... little Rocky seems at ease as he hangs on his mother's hip dressed in a black sports jersey and joggers -- no stage fright, just like his rockstar dad!

Launch Gallery
Kourtney and Travis Together Launch Gallery

The event was a family affair ... as Travis' other son, Landon, was also seen supporting his pops. The foursome was photographed being whisked away in a golf cart -- packing the back seat so they could all sit together.

Mega

Travis was clearly feeling the love -- flashing a peace sign as Fontana showed up big for one of their own.

Mega

And it was certainly a big day for Rocky, who at this point, has not walked a red carpet ... but did make his official public debut back in February on "The Kardashians."

As you know ... Rocky is KK and TB's pride and joy ... they welcomed him in November 2023 after trying to conceive for quite some time.

They have a bustling household of seven between the two of them, so there’s no shortage of action at the Barker-Kardashian abode -- and plenty to keep Rocky entertained!

  • Share on Facebook
  • Share on X

Bow Wow No Haters in My Comments These Days ... See How Good I Look!!!

  • Exclusive
  • 110 shares
Published June 7, 2025 5:55 PM PDT
HATERS CAN'T GET ME DOWN
TMZ.com

Bow Wow's letting haters' jabs melt off him like the pounds he recently lost ... saying the people trying to body shame him aren't going to affect his mood.

We caught up with the rapper at LAX Friday ... and, we asked him if people are still in his comments disrespecting him for putting a few pounds on.

"Don’t call me f*cking fat if you don’t know the facts."

Bow Wow addresses fans in his comments who are calling him fat, and says "if I have a role to do, I’m going to get fat."

(🎥 livebitez/Instagram) pic.twitter.com/mw61ILLJ4W

— The Art Of Dialogue (@ArtOfDialogue_) June 2, 2025 @ArtOfDialogue_

ICYMI ... Bow Wow fired back at people on Instagram Live recently saying, “They call me fat. Y’all don’t understand how this feels. Y’all been playing with me too long.”

Ben Crump Elon's Right About the Trump Bill ... Totally Against It!!!

  • Exclusive
  • 183 shares
Published June 7, 2025 5:20 PM PDT
WE NEED HUMANITY!!!
TMZ.com

Ben Crump's picked his side in the Elon Musk and Donald Trump beef ... but, he's not backing a personality, he says he's backing the better idea -- and, he doesn't want the "One Big Beautiful Bill" to pass through the Senate.

We caught up with the civil rights activist and attorney and asked him about the fight between POTUS and his former advisor ... and, he doesn't directly say he's on Elon's side -- but, he does think this spending bill is terrible.

SORRY, NOT INTERESTED 🤷‍♂️
ABC

Crump rips the bill for making cuts to Medicaid -- the medical assistance program for people with lower incomes.

Stars & Scars You Be the Judge

  • 37 shares
Published June 7, 2025 12:45 AM PDT
Getty/TMZ Composite

President Trump and Elon Musk go from "First Bros" to nuclear war, Diddy's exes (and Bill Maher) spark heated debate about abuse victims and Kylie Jenner shares the map to her treasure chest. So, we gotta ask ...

Who Ya Got?
Something Went Wrong

Stars Celebrating Pride Mariah, Paris, Yolanda ... Hollywood Goes Full 🌈!!!

  • 167 shares
Published June 7, 2025 4:00 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Stars With PRIDE! Launch Gallery

When Pride hits, Hollywood doesn’t just show support -- it detonates in glitter. From rainbow chaos to star-studded selfies, the A-list turns the streets into one big fabulous runway ... and honey, they don't hold back.

You've got Cara Delevingne, Sophia Bush, JoJo Siwa, and 'Mean Girls' king Jonathan Bennett living their loudest, proudest lives -- while icons like Mariah Carey, Yolanda Hadid, and Paris Hilton roll up in full ally mode, rainbow flag blowing in the wind behind them.

If there’s one thing about Pride -- it’s for everyone. From Oscar queen Jessica Chastain to always-glam Lizzo, the celeb crowd shows up and shows out. Happy Pride Month, babes! 🌈

  • Share on Facebook
  • Share on X

Iggy Azalea Still So 'Fancy' ... In the Fast Lane with These Hot Shots!!!

  • 116 shares
Published June 7, 2025 4:46 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Iggy Azalea's Hot Shots Launch Gallery
Instagram

Iggy Azalea's proving she's still "Fancy" after so many years of fame ... and, we've got her hottest shots to prove it.

The singer turned 35 on Saturday ... and, whether she's wearing a chic gown or a swimsuit, Iggy's outfits are never a "Problem."

Here she is bringing the sunshine to these snaps ... dressed in a fashionable pastel dress -- full of yellows and pinks.

Travis Decker Search History Prior to Alleged Murders Revealed ... Questions About Starting New Life in Canada

  • 256 shares
Published June 7, 2025 4:04 PM PDT
Wenatchee Police Department / Chelan County Sheriff's Office / GoFundMe Composite

Travis Decker's search history contained a lot of questions about moving to Canada just before his daughters went missing ... according to the U.S. Marshals Service.

In a new affidavit filed earlier this week, Deputy Keegan Stanley of the U.S. Marshals Service explains officers obtained Decker's search history around the time the warrant for his arrest was issued.

Wenatchee Police Department

On May 26, 2025, Stanley writes Decker allegedly searched several questions including ... "“how does a person move to canada”, “how to relocate to canada”, and "jobs canada."

Diddy Trial See the Photos of Bryana Bongolan's Controversial Alleged Injuries

  • 150 shares
Published June 7, 2025 1:05 PM PDT | Updated June 7, 2025 3:35 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Click to See the Injuries Launch Gallery

Diddy faced accusations of dangling a woman off a balcony during his trial this week ... with the prosecution entering photos of her alleged injuries -- though the defense countered the claims.

Bryana Bongolan -- a fashion designer and friend of Cassie's -- testified that Diddy stormed into Cassie's apartment one night. While Bongolan was out on the balcony, either smoking a blunt or about to, she says Diddy grabbed her and held her over the balcony.

Instagram / @banathegoat

She alleges he screamed ... "You know what the f*** you did" at her before she says he pulled her back onto the balcony and slammed her into some furniture.

Jared Leto Accused of Inappropriate Behavior Toward Underage Girls

  • 1.3K shares
Published June 7, 2025 3:19 PM PDT
Getty

Jared Leto is being accused of inappropriate behavior via phone calls, emails and text messages with underage girls ... with the allegations coming out in a new report.

Air Mail -- a weekly newsletter founded by Vanity Fair's former editor-in-chief Graydon Carter and former New York Times reporter Alessandra Stanley -- published an exposé with accounts from several women who say they met him before they turned 18.

Getty

According to the report, a few of these women claim Leto asked for their phone numbers ... including one who says she was just 16 years old when he texted with her in 2006.

Pacman Jones Arrested For Assaulting Officer, Public Intoxication

  • 131 shares
Published June 7, 2025 2:23 PM PDT

Pacman Jones found himself in the slammer again Saturday morning -- the ex-NFL star was arrested after a run-in with cops near Cincinnati.

Jones -- who is no stranger to legal trouble -- was arrested by police in Covington, KY on charges of assault of an officer, public intoxication and disorderly conduct.

RUN-IN WITH COPS
Instagram/@realpacman24

Details surrounding the arrest were not made available.

Bill Maher Doubles Down on Cassie Take ... #MeToo Has Changed Things!!!

  • 138 shares
Published June 7, 2025 12:30 PM PDT | Updated June 7, 2025 2:24 PM PDT
TIMES ARE DIFFERENT
TMZ Studios

Bill Maher's not apologizing to people who hated his recent comments about Cassie ... standing by his argument she essentially made a deal with the devil for fame.

The comedian and talk show host joined us on "TMZ Presents: United States V. Sean Combs: Inside the Diddy Trial" ... and, he says he wasn't trying to say Cassie was 100% consenting to freak-offs with her texts -- and, he can see why an abuse victim might send a follow-up message about their enjoyment of the experience to their abuser.

A Rule For Victims
HBO

Bill says a lot has changed since the #MeToo movement ... but, he knows people who are in abusive relationships with powerful men may still try to at least get ahead professionally if they were being put through such abuse.

Kelvin Joseph Jr. Former Cowboys CB Arrested For DWI After Fatal Crash

  • 65 shares
Published June 7, 2025 2:20 PM PDT
Getty

Kelvin Joseph Jr. -- a once-promising young NFL player -- has been arrested in Texas in connection with a fatal crash.

The former Dallas Cowboys cornerback was taken into custody Saturday morning after an accident left a 27-year-old motorcycle rider dead in Richardson, Texas.

Richardson Police Department

According to an explanation on the Richardson Police Department Facebook page ... officers were called to the scene of a crash at approximately 5 AM this morning, where they found Cody Morris of Plano, Texas, deceased. There was not another vehicle there.

Singer Wayne Lewis Dead at 68 ... R&B Legend, Cofounder of Group Atlantic Starr

  • 1.1K shares
Published June 7, 2025 12:28 PM PDT | Updated June 7, 2025 12:59 PM PDT
Launch Gallery
Remembering Wayne Lewis Launch Gallery
Getty

Wayne Lewis -- an R&B singer best known for starting up the group Atlantic Starr -- has died ... according to a Facebook post put up by the band.

The band shared the announcement Friday ... letting fans know Wayne passed away Thursday.

Getty

They asked fans to respect his family's privacy at this time. A cause of death was not provided. We've reached out to the band for more information.
